title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - China's Tech Ascendancy: AI and Quantum Computing to Dominate Future Landscape
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: Trump meets with tech companies
description: WASHINGTON -- President Donald Trump invited technology companies to the White House on Wednesday to commit to developing their own power generation as he tries to ease tensions over the cost of electricity used by data centers to develop artificial intelligence.

title: What the Extraordinary Market Volatility in Asia Says About Energy and A.I.
description: Stocks in South Korea and Taiwan, the center of global chip making, plunged on fears about energy prices. Their recovery shows the bullishness over artificial intelligence.
content:
Stocks across most of Asia rallied on Thursday, a day after tumbling over fears around the region’s heavy reliance on imported oil and gas.

title: Tesla says it could build the first humanoid AGI
description: The company’s robot project Optimus is central to Elon Musk’s vision of human level artificial intelligence.

title: China’s parents are outsourcing the homework grind to AI
description: Across China, where education is famously cutthroat, parents are turning to artificial intelligence to gain a competitive edge. Some are making interactive learning games or using chatbots to grade their children's homework. Others are using AI-powered gadgets to get past a language barrier.

title: SoftBank Group CDS Rises to Near Year
description: SoftBank Group Corp.’s credit default swaps widened to an 11-month high and remained the widest among Japanese corporates as its heavy investment in artificial intelligence weighs on its credit profile.
content:

title: Meta plans to develop custom chips to train its AI models
description: Meta Platforms Inc, which recently reached major deals with top chipmakers, still has ambitions for its own custom silicon, including plans to develop processors that can train future artificial intelligence models, the company's chief financial officer said.
